# Harness Engineering Documentation Index

## Core Contracts
- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md) — Always-on project contract, reading order, marker/artifact rules.
- [Overview](./00-overview/README.md) — Project scope, engineering rubric, source authority.
- [Project Setup](./01-project-setup/README.md) — Host/toolchain preflight, bootstrap and discovery gates.
- [Build Commands](./03-os-harness-config/build-commands.md) — Canonical Makefile, artifact contract, linker script.
- [Boot Markers](./03-os-harness-config/boot-markers.md) — COM1 marker protocol and exact parser rules.
- [Validation](./06-validation/README.md) — Boot-test protocol, drift checks, negative parser fixtures.
- [Safety](./09-safety-and-security/README.md) — QEMU host safety and evidence isolation.
- [Red Team](./red-team/README.md) — Guest-only adversarial probes and red/blue defense-regression gates.
- [Blue Team](./blue-team/README.md) — Current blocked findings, patch playbooks, and future strict verification gates.
- [Implementation Checklist](./10-implementation-checklist/README.md) — Pre-implementation gate checklist.
- [Reference](./11-reference/README.md) — Anti-patterns, glossary, source map.
- [Git Change Management](./12-git-change-management/README.md) — Git status, branch, diff, staging, commit, push, and handoff gates.
- [Harness Profile](./harness_profile.yaml) — Single source of truth for phase, markers, claim status, gates, and MiMo next tasks.
- [Agent Routing And Risk](./13-agent-routing-and-risk/README.md) — Claim-aware routing matrix and next-task priority order.

## Executable Skills
- [compile-and-run](./.agent/skills/compile-and-run/SKILL.md) — Build OS image and run QEMU boot marker test.
- [regression-validation](./.agent/skills/regression-validation/SKILL.md) — Run harness contract drift and materialization checks.
- [git-change-management](./.agent/skills/git-change-management/SKILL.md) — Read-only Git preflight and change handoff checks.

## Human Skill Index
- [OS Skills](./04-skills/README.md) — Bootloader, GDT, kernel entry, serial, runtime primitives, regression validation.
- [Sub-Agents](./05-sub-agents/README.md) — Role contracts, permissions, concurrency policy.
- [Memory And State](./07-memory-and-state/README.md) — Progress, decisions, machine evidence templates.
- [Platform Guides](./08-platform-guides/README.md) — Claude/Codex/Gemini mapping without unsupported platform claims.

## External Source Authority
- [QEMU System Emulation](https://www.qemu.org/docs/master/system/)
- [NASM Documentation](https://www.nasm.us/doc/)
- [GNU Binutils objcopy](https://sourceware.org/binutils/docs/binutils/objcopy.html)
- [OSDev Wiki](https://wiki.osdev.org)
- [Intel SDM](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/developer/articles/technical/intel-sdm.html)
- [Birgitta Böckeler - Harness Engineering](https://martinfowler.com/articles/exploring-gen-ai/harness-engineering.html)
- [Google Engineering Practices - Small CLs](https://google.github.io/eng-practices/review/developer/small-cls.html)
- [Google Engineering Practices - Code Review Standard](https://google.github.io/eng-practices/review/reviewer/standard.html)
- [Meta Diff Risk Score](https://engineering.fb.com/2025/08/06/developer-tools/diff-risk-score-drs-ai-risk-aware-software-development-meta/)
- [Microsoft Azure Repos Branch Policies](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/repos/git/branch-policies?view=azure-devops)
- [Swift.org Contributing](https://www.swift.org/contributing/)
- [Netflix TechBlog - Improving Pull Request Confidence](https://netflixtechblog.medium.com/improving-pull-request-confidence-for-the-netflix-tv-app-b85edb05eb65)
- [Tesla Fleet Telemetry Contributing](https://github.com/teslamotors/fleet-telemetry/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Red/Blue Meta Loop](./14-meta-loop/README.md) — Observe, reproduce, attack, patch, verify, release, and feed evidence back into the harness.
- [Patch Releases](./releases/) — Evidence-scoped patch announcements with residual-risk boundaries.
